Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_steptogoal -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 root@46.101.197.19 'docker logs --since 15m subradar-api-prod 2>&1; echo "--DEV--"; docker logs --since 15m subradar-api-dev 2>&1')
